<!-- indicator: fig-0to4-hosp-asthma-gastor-om-pnu-rate -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-0to4-hosp-asthma-gastor-om-pnu-rate
#| fig-cap: 'Asthma, Gastroenteritis, Otitis Media, and Pneumonia Hospitalizations, Rate per 10,000 Population 0–4 Years Old, 2020–2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Asthma, Gastroenteritis, Otitis Media, and Pneumonia Hospitalizations, Rate per 10,000 Population 0–4 Years Old, 2020–2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-0to4-hosp-asthma-gastor-om-pnu-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
